{{CargoRelic
|name=Black Hole Photo
|class_id=20309
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=This photo, taken by the Event Horizon Telescope, shows a super-massive blackhole that is 55 million light-years away from Earth. It weighs equivalent to 6.5 billion suns. This photo conclusively proves the theory of general relativity.
|fame=16
|art=10
|fth=21
|civ=13
|tech=30
|ss1=Per 400 Relic Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Relic Points: 2000/2000
|ss2=Per 400 Relic Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Relic Points: 4000/4000
|ss3=Per 400 Relic Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Relic Points: 6000/6000
|ss4=Per 400 Relic Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Relic Points: 6000/6000
|ss7=Per 400 Relic Points, Snail DEF +3<br>Relic Points: 6000/6000<br> (Awakened)
}}
